scripts.validate:intents: for state in .amadeus/intents/*/state.json; do intent_dir=${state%/state.json}; intent=${intent_dir##*/}; bun run .agents/skills/amadeus-intent-validator/validator/IntentValidator.ts . "$intent"; done
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate && npm run validate:intents
